category.scope_note: Lithium batteries and power banks for China-to-Rwanda export compliance comparison.

title.en: China-to-Rwanda Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入卢旺达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入盧旺達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of China-to-Rwanda requirements for lithium batteries and power banks, with focus on Rwanda Standards Board product controls, RS/IEC safety references, RURA wireless compliance, in-country importer duties, and UN 38.3 transport.
description.zh: 对照中国出口卢旺达锂电池/移动电源要求，覆盖卢旺达标准局准入、RS/IEC安全依据、RURA无线要求、当地进口商职责及UN 38.3运输。
description.zht: 對照中國出口盧旺達鋰電池/行動電源要求，涵蓋盧旺達標準局准入、RS/IEC安全依據、RURA無線要求、當地進口商責任及UN 38.3運輸。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Verify all requirements with official sources before export; this is not a certification, legal, customs, or permit decision.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。出运前请向官方渠道确认要求，本页面不构成认证、法律、海关或许可决定。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。出運前請向官方渠道確認要求，本頁面不構成認證、法律、海關或許可決定。

answer_first.en: The Rwanda lane is driven by importer-led PVoC/CoC and import-inspection processes, plus evidence for RS/IEC-aligned safety and UN 38.3 transport, with logistics commonly passing through Mombasa or Dar es Salaam.
answer_first.zh: 卢旺达路线的核心是进口商主导的PVoC与合格证书和进口检验流程，同时需具备RS/IEC对齐安全与UN 38.3运输证明，货物多经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆转口。
answer_first.zht: 盧旺達路徑的核心是進口商主導的PVoC與合格證書和進口檢驗流程，同時需具備RS/IEC對齊安全與UN 38.3運輸證明，貨物多經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆轉口。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Keep source links and requirements synced to official RSB, RURA, and transport references.
